combined_text: The X-Files review â reboot gets off to a stuttering start then gains momentum The X-Files The X-Files review – reboot gets off to a stuttering start then gains momentum The first episode of the show’s return fails to drag it into the present – but the third episode is a spectacular deconstruction of not only the show but its genre Brian Moylan@brianjmoylan Fri 22 Jan 2016 04.
